achievements.title: Gold Medalist
achievements.description: Awarded Gold Medal for securing First Rank in Bachelor of Science (Computer Science) with a CGPI of 9.85.
achievements.organization: R.P. Gogate College of Arts & Science and R.V. Jogalekar College of Commerce (Autonomous), Ratnagiri

achievements.title: First Rank Holder - BSc Computer Science
achievements.description: Secured First Rank in BSc Computer Science under the University of Mumbai.

achievements.title: Web Phoenix 2022
achievements.description: Won First Rank in the Phoenix In-House Software Competition in the Web Category for developing a Spotify Clone project.
achievements.organization: Department of Computer Science, R.P. Gogate College

achievements.title: App Phoenix 2023-24
achievements.description: Secured Second Rank in the Phoenix In-House Software Competition in the App Category for developing the KKNotes BSc CS application.
achievements.organization: Department of Computer Science, R.P. Gogate College

achievements.title: General Secretary
achievements.description: Served as General Secretary of the Student Council and led student activities with responsibility, humility, and sincerity.
achievements.organization: R.P. Gogate College of Arts & Science and R.V. Jogalekar College of Commerce

achievements.title: Cyber Warrior
achievements.description: Recognized by Quick Heal Foundation for outstanding contribution to the Cyber Shiksha for Cyber Suraksha initiative and promoting cyber security awareness among students and communities.
